plugin_desc: Mitel voice gateway and PBX SNMP baseline child template. This child template relies on the shared VoiceGateway SNMP floor for MIB-II uptime and IF-MIB 64-bit HC interface traffic. The Mitel enterprise root and call server MIB families are verified, but stable shared CPU, memory, temperature, fan and power health scalars are not proven in this pass, so they are not promoted into shared device-health metrics.
name: VoiceGateway
